title: festuca triticoides
intro: Festuca triticoides, also known as tall fescue, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Festuca triticoides include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with allergies, asthma, and other respiratory conditions. Festuca triticoides can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and is also sometimes used as a natural dye and in traditional folk medicine.
